retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds; no failure path exists; retry would be a double-put (use-after-free risk).
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper that decrements the reference count of an amdxdna_sched_job via kref_put. After calling, the caller must not use the job pointer unless they hold another reference. If the reference count reaches zero, aie2_job_release is called to free the job. The caller must ensure that a matching get (kref_get) was previously called before this put.
